category_sources: source_facts.description says simple-mtpfs is an MTP FUSE filesystem driver; official README describes a FUSE filesystem for MTP devices.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository use the name simple-mtpfs.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs site found; official GitHub README contains description, installation, and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/phatina/simple-mtpfs; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official README identify a command-line FUSE filesystem for USB MTP devices.
